title: Enhance Simulation Debugging Infrastructure
description: Enhance Simulation Debugging Infrastructure - Implement comprehensive debugging, logging, and observability enhancements for LICHEN simulation infrastructure to enable fast debug, fix, retry cycles. Features include enhanced logging with contextual information, debug mode controls, fail-fast mechanisms, and detailed system state tracking. This work supports the broader Epic: Complete Simulation Infrastructure Enhancement Epic.
close_reason: Completed comprehensive simulation debugging infrastructure enhancements including enhanced logging with contextual information, debug mode controls, fail-fast mechanisms, and detailed system state tracking that enables fast debug, fix, retry cycles
